ocrProvider.description: Provider used for OCR. 'copilot' routes through an LLM vision model; 'local' uses RapidOCR / PP-OCRv5 via ONNX. Defaults to 'copilot'.

smartCrop.description: Run smart-crop preprocessing on each frame before perceptual hashing, OCR, and vision. When true (or null + crop.enabled=true in config), Teams/Zoom/WebEx UI chrome is removed.

smartCropProfile.description: Smart-crop profile identifier. auto/teams/zoom/webex/generic share the same algorithm in this release; 'off' disables crop regardless of smartCrop.

captureMode.description: Frame-capture mode. 'auto' (default in 0.14+) tries yt-dlp + ffmpeg first and falls back to browser on failure; known browser-only hosts (Microsoft Build / Medius / mediastream) skip yt-dlp entirely. 'ytdlp' forces yt-dlp + ffmpeg. 'browser' forces Playwright. Browser fallback emits CAPTURE_BROWSER_FALLBACK.

authProfile.description: Name of a Playwright storage-state profile (created by `zakira-replay auth login`) to load into the browser context for SSO/cookie-gated sources. Only consulted in browser or auto capture mode. Emits AUTH_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND or AUTH_PROFILE_STALE warnings.

useDiarization.description: Run local sherpa-onnx speaker diarization (pyannote-segmentation-3.0 + 3D-Speaker embedding) over the audio after STT, attributing each transcript segment to a SPEAKER_NN cluster.

numSpeakers.description: Hard cluster count for diarization when the orchestrator knows how many speakers are present. When null, `diarizationThreshold` controls the clustering cutoff.

diarizationThreshold.description: Cosine-distance cutoff for agglomerative clustering when `numSpeakers` is null. Lower values produce more clusters. Defaults to 0.5.

visionProvider.description: Vision provider to use when `useVision` is true. `copilot` (default) routes per-slide vision through the configured LLM. `local` runs the fully-on-device LocalOnnxVisionProvider — no LLM, no network — with structured fields derived from OCR plus optional CLIP zero-shot classification and BLIP image captioning.

localVisionMode.description: Sub-mode for the local vision provider. `heuristic` uses zero models. `clip` adds CLIP zero-shot classification for the `kind` field. `clip-blip` (default for the local provider) additionally runs BLIP image captioning to fill `freeText`. Ignored when `visionProvider` is `copilot`.

secondaryCaptionLanguages.description: Languages (BCP-47 primary subtag, or 'auto') to also persist as transcript.<lang>.md alongside the primary. Off by default.

preferInlineMedia.description: Skip the in-browser play+duration probe; resolve the source's inline media URL (e.g. Medius HLS) and seek via ffmpeg. Fast path for MSE players that don't boot headlessly. Defaults to false.

autoplayPolicy.description: Per-run override for the Chromium autoplay policy. Values: default | no-user-gesture-required. Per-host map in capture.browser.autoplayPolicyByHost still applies when this is unset.

allowMediaDownload.description: Opt in to downloading the source media to local disk when no direct URL or inline-media URL is reachable. Default null = inherit capture.allowMediaDownload from config (which defaults to false). Set true to allow yt-dlp DownloadMediaForProcessing and the browser STT media-collector. False to explicitly deny even when config allows.

captureDebug.description: Diagnostic capture toggle (writes network.log, response bodies, texttracks state, HAR to runs/<id>/debug/). Per-run override for capture.browser.debug. Null = inherit config.
